articles.title: BREAKING: ARK Invest Has Applied for Spot Ethereum ETF
articles.description: According to the latest information, ARK Invest has submitted its Ethereum Spot ETF application to the SEC. ARK Invest has partnered with 21Shares, a leading ETF provider, to launch the spot Ethereum ETF. The product, called ARK 21Shares Ethereum ETF, will attempt to track the performance of ETH, the native cryptocurrency of the Ethereum network, […] Continue Reading: BREAKING: ARK...

articles.title: Cardano’s ADA is Set For a Potential Bull Run: Technical Analyst
articles.description: Crypto technical analyst CryptoBusy thinks Cardano’s current price situation sets it up for a potential bull run. According to CryptoBusy, ADA has formed a large falling wedge from an all-time high (ATH) down to its current price. articles.title: Visa Broadens Stablecoin Settlement Reach with Circle’s USDC by Tapping Solana
